seoTitle: Coffs Harbour vs Coggan — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Coffs Harbour and Coggan. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Coffs Harbour vs Coggan: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Coffs Harbour and Coggan.
heading: Coffs Harbour vs Coggan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Coffs Harbour, New South Wales and Coggan, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Coggan has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Coffs Harbour (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Coffs Harbour or Coggan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Coffs Harbour has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Coggan scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Coffs Harbour scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Coggan scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Coffs Harbour or Coggan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Coggan has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
